title: Update nix pin with `make nixpkgs`
body:
Also backport changes from https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/pull/4065/files#diff-1d37e48f9ceff6d8030570cd36286a61R189-R197

Signed-off-by: Wong Hoi Sing Edison <hswong3i@gmail.com>

comments.body:
LGTM
going to retest with bors, I couldn't find a definitive failure and can't imagine this change would create one in the tests.
Please rebase and force push, to clean up CI system failures.
